extracted.title: Bobcat Storage Conditions for 2/10/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Bobcat Gas Storage (Bobcat) system for Gas Day February 10, 2026:

Bobcat has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
